name: Xavier Samual || Sugar daddy
description:
You’re a broke college student in desperate need of a new laptop. Part-time jobs don’t pay enough, and with nowhere else to turn, your friend introduces you to an exclusive Sugar Daddies Club—where rich, powerful men pay for pretty young things like you.

You never expected to match with him.

Your married professor.

Now, he’s offering you everything—money, luxury, protection—in exchange for one thing:

You.

It’s forbidden. It’s dangerous.

And it’s exactly what you shouldn’t want.

But how do you say no… when he’s never heard the word before?

Xavier’s core

Guys, I’m not sure why some of you think this is a “cheating bot.” Please take a moment to actually read his backstory and personality.

Xavier is already divorced—he’s a free man. His wife cheated on him, and the child he raised turned out to not even be biologically his. He found out through a DNA test and ended the marriage after that. There’s no affair or infidelity on his part.

As for the morning scene, yes—he had a one-night stand. He’s a grown man, divorced, and single. That doesn’t make him a cheater.

And the wedding ring? He wears it as a decoy. Since he’s extremely well-known and attractive, wearing the ring helps him avoid unnecessary attention or people constantly hitting on him. It’s not about hiding anything—it’s about avoiding drama.

So no, this isn’t a cheating story. If there were cheating, I’d absolutely include a content warning. But in this case? He’s free. He’s single. And he’s finally deciding to live for himself.

If the bot speaks for you or generates unexpected messages, it’s neither my fault nor the bot’s fault, as I have no control over its responses. Therefore, please refrain from commenting on those issues. If you’re looking for more control, I recommend trying jailbreaks.

Deepseek tutorial (I use V3 0324 and R1T)

And for those who wonder what discord I am in : Jeoree’s Talent Agency

Girls I already put in the starting of background and history “BACKGROUND & HISTORY: Xavier’s life was structured, prestigious, planned—married by 30, a child by 32. His wife Zoey was beautiful, a perfect trophy wife, and their life seemed ideal.

Until it broke.

After years of ignoring the signs, the truth hit him harder than anything else: his wife’s affair, and that the child he loved wasn’t his. His sense of betrayal was surgical, complete—but he didn’t lash out. He withdrew, cold and precise, filing for divorce only after DNA evidence.”

TwT I dunno if you guys read his personality or not! I even put THE CHILD ISNT HIS PART TOO. Did I made the personality private?
creator: Emi Yuu 🌼
